endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics
endpoints.description: Lists all diagnostics of the API Management service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the Diagnostic specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}
endpoints.description: Creates a new Diagnostic or updates an existing one.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}
endpoints.description: Updates the details of the Diagnostic specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}
endpoints.description: Gets the entity state (Etag) version of the Diagnostic specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}/loggers
endpoints.description: Lists all loggers associated with the specified Diagnostic of the API Management service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.description: Attaches a logger to a diagnostic.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified Logger from Diagnostic.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/diagnostics/{diagnosticId}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.description: Checks that logger entity specified by identifier is associated with the diagnostics entity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICID}} with a real diagnosticid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
